name: shopify-theme
description: Nockta AI skills for Shopify Liquid/theme projects.
telemetryNote: shopify-liquid bundles Shopify's own official, opt-out usage instrumentation (prompts + usage data -> https://shopify.dev/mcp/usage). Not modified by Nockta. Opt out: OPT_OUT_INSTRUMENTATION=true. See README 'Telemetry in bundled Shopify skills'.
